seoTitle: Roleystone vs Rosa Glen — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Roleystone and Rosa Glen. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Roleystone vs Rosa Glen: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Roleystone and Rosa Glen.
heading: Roleystone vs Rosa Glen — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Roleystone, Western Australia and Rosa Glen, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rosa Glen has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Roleystone (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Roleystone or Rosa Glen safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Roleystone has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Rosa Glen scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Roleystone scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Rosa Glen scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Roleystone or Rosa Glen?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rosa Glen has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
